entries.pf2e.vehicle.propertydescriptioncollisio: The vehicle's collision damage. Unless otherwise stated, collisions deal bludgeoning damage.
The vehicle's DC for saving throws to mitigate damage.
entries.pf2e.vehicle.propertydescriptioncrew: The crew members required to operate the vehicle.
entries.pf2e.vehicle.propertydescriptionpassenge: The number of passengers the vehicle is typically configured to carry, if any.
entries.pf2e.vehicle.propertydescriptionpiloting: This entry lists the skills that can be used for piloting checks while operating the vehicle. Some skills may increase the DC; these list the DC adjustment in parentheses following the skill name.
entries.pf2e.vehicle.propertydescriptionprice: Vehicle's Price. This does not include creatures for pulling a vehicle, materials needed to power the vehicle, or the cost of rowers.
entries.pf2e.vehicle.propertydescriptionspace: Vehicle's dimensions, not including any creatures pulling the vehicle.
entries.pf2e.vehicle.propertydescriptionspeed: The vehicle's Speeds, each followed by the propulsion type for that Speed in parentheses. A pulled vehicle indicates the number and size of the pulling creatures.
entries.pf2e.wall.door.outofreach: The door is out of reach.
entries.pf2e.weaponbasedamagetitle: This section configures the base damage for the weapon. Additional die from Striking runes should not be added here and instead configured in the Weapon Runes section above.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.anchoring.name: Anchoring
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.anchoring.note.c: If you critically hit a target with an anchoring weapon, the weapon casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ksLCg62cLOojw3gN]{Dimensional Anchor} on the target (@Check[will|dc:27|name:Anchoring Rune], counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+17 # Anchoring Rune Counteract Check]]{+17}).
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.ashen.name: Ashen
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.ashen.note.succe: This ash clouds the senses, causing the creature to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round unless it succeeds at a @Check[will|dc:25] save.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.astral.name: Astral
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.astral.note.crit: On a critical hit against a creature possessing another creature, the possessing creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:26] save or be expelled and unable to possess a creature for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.astral.note.note: This rune has the same effects as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} rune. If used to attack a creature that's possessing another creature, this weapon deals no damage to the possessed creature.

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.crushing.note.cr: When you critically hit a target with this weapon, your target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.zNHvhwHsC8ckhKVp]{Effect: Crushing}

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.fearsome.note.cr: When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.flaming.note.cri: On a critical hit, you deal an additional 1d10 persistent fire damage.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.flickering.name: Flickering
On a critical hit, the weapon flashes bright pulses of color into the creature's eyes, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzling} the creature for 1 round (this effect has the visual trait).
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.flurrying.name: Flurrying

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.frost.note.criti: On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:24|name:Frost Rune] save.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.ghosttouch.name: Ghost Touch
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.ghosttouch.note: The weapon can harm creatures without physical form. A ghost touch weapon is particularly effective against incorporeal creatures, which almost always have a specific vulnerability to ghost touch weapons. Incorporeal creatures can touch, hold, and wield ghost touch weapons (unlike most physical objects).
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.giantkilling.not: On a critical hit with this weapon, the giant is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of your next turn.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greateranchoring: When you critically hit a target with a weapon with the anchoring rune, the weapon casts 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ksLCg62cLOojw3gN]{Dimensional Anchor} on the target (@Check[will|dc:38|name:Greater Anchoring Rune], counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+28 #Greater Anchoring Rune Counteract Check]]{+28}), except that if the target critically succeeds at its Will save, instead of having no effect, the dimensional anchor lasts for 1 round.

When you hit a target with the weapon but don't critically hit, the target is affected by 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ksLCg62cLOojw3gN]{Dimensional Anchor} for 1 round without a save (counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+28 #Greater Anchoring Rune Counteract Check]]{+28}).
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterashen.not: This ash clouds the senses, causing the creature to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round unless it succeeds at a @Check[will|dc:35] save. On a critical failure, the effect lasts for 1 minute.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterastral.no: On a critical hit against a creature possessing another creature, the possessing creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:36] save or be expelled and unable to possess a creature for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

This rune has the same effects as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} rune. If used to attack a creature that's possessing another creature, this weapon deals no damage to the possessed creature.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterbrilliant: Damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's resistances to fire, spirit, and vitality. On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:41|name:Greater Brilliant Rune] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.
Damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's resistances to fire, spirit, and vitality.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greatercorrosive: The acid damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's acid resistance. On a critical hit, the target's armor (if any) takes @Damage[6d6[acid]] damage (before applying Hardness); if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes this damage instead.
The acid damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's acid resistance.
Your critical hits leave the target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.czdEHtLsrUcZxSDx]{Effect: Crushing (Greater)}
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterdisruptin: On a critical hit, the undead creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} as long as it has the persistent damage from this rune.
When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterflaming.n: On a critical hit, you deal an additional 2d10 persistent fire damage. Fire damage dealt by this weapon (including the persistent fire damage) ignores the target's fire resistance.
Fire damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's fire resistance.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterfrost.not: Cold damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's cold resistance. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34|name:Greater Frost Rune] save.
Cold damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's cold resistance.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greatergiantkill:
On a critical hit with this weapon, the giant must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] with the following effects.
Critical Success The giant is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of your next turn.
Success The giant is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of your next turn and takes @Damage[1d10[mental]].
Failure The giant is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for the next minute and takes @Damage[2d10[mental]].
Critical Failure The giant is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} for the next minute and takes @Damage[4d10[mental]].
Mental damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's mental resistance.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterimpactful: On a critical hit, you can choose to force the target to succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:37|name:Greater Impactful Rune] save or be pushed 10 feet away from you.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterrooting.n: When you critically hit a target with this weapon, roots grow from the target. It's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{immobilized} for 1 round ([[/act escape dc=28]]) and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for as long as the immobilization lasts.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greatershock.not: Electricity damage dealt by this weapon ignores the targets electricity resistance (and the other creatures' on a critical hit). On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target.
Electricity damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's electricity resistance.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.greaterthunderin: Sonic damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's sonic resistance. On a critical hit, the target has to succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34|name:Greater Thundering Rune] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} permanently.
Sonic damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's sonic resistance.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.name: Grievous
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.ax: You can damage a third creature, with the same restrictions.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.bo: The Athletics check to pull the missile free is DC 20.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.br: The target takes a -4 circumstance penalty to its save.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.cl: You can knock the target up to 15 feet away.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.cr: If the target of the critical hit is adjacent to a surface, it gets stuck to that surface by the missile, as the bow critical specialization.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.da: The base persistent bleed damage increases to @Damage[2d6[persistent,bleed]].
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.fi: The target takes a –4 circumstance penalty to its save.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.fl: You move the target 5 feet. You can't move it away from you, but you can move it in another direction of your choice.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.ha: You can also knock the target 5 feet away from you.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.kn: The target takes a -5-foot status penalty to its Speed while it has the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{Persistent Bleed Damage}.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.pi: The extra damage from the critical specialization effect increases to 4 per weapon damage die.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.po: You can move the target up to 10 feet.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.sh: You can knock the target up to 10 feet away.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.sl: The target also takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speed for 1 round if it fails the save.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.sp: The clumsy condition lasts for 2 rounds.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.grievous.note.sw: The target is off-guard until the end of your next turn.

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.holy.name: Holy
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.holy.note.critic:
Holy Healing R (concentrate, healing, vitality)

Frequency once per day

Trigger You critically succeed at a Strike against an unholy creature with the weapon

Effect You regain HP equal to double the unholy creature's level.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.hooked.name: Hooked
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.hooked.note.crit: If a hooked weapon normally has the trip trait, you can attempt to Trip a foe as a reaction when you critically hit it with the hooked weapon.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.hopeful.name: Hopeful
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.hopeful.note.cri: On a critical hit with this weapon, you inspire your comrades, pushing them to fight harder and stand for your shared convictions. Allies within 30 feet that share at least one alignment component with you gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls until the end of your next turn.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.impactful.name: Impactful
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.impactful.note.c: On a critical hit, you can choose to force the target to succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:27|name:Impactful Rune] save or be pushed 5 feet away from you.

If you critically hit a creature that's already stupefied, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} as well. These critical hit effects have the emotion, fear, and mental traits.

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.returning.name: Returning
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.returning.note: When you make a thrown Strike with this weapon, it flies back to your hand after the Strike is complete. If your hands are full when the weapon returns, it falls to the ground in your space.
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.rooting.name: Rooting
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.rooting.note.cri: When you critically hit a target with this weapon, roots grow from the target. entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.shockwave.note: The attacker is immune to the splash damage.

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.speed.note: While wielding a quickstrike weapon, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition, but you can use the additional action granted only to make a Strike with the etched weapon.

It's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{immobilized} for 1 round ([[/act escape dc=41]]) and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for as long as the immobilization lasts.

Unholy Bloodshed R (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll against a holy creature with the weapon

entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.vorpal.name: Vorpal
entries.pf2e.weaponpropertyrune.vorpal.note.crit:
Snicker-Snack R (concentrate, death, incapacitation)

Trigger You roll a natural 20 on a Strike with the weapon against a creature that has a head, critically succeed, and deal slashing damage

Effect The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:37|traits:death,incapacitation|name:Vorpal Rune] save or be decapitated. This kills any creature except ones that don't require a head to live. For creatures with multiple heads, this usually kills the creature only if you sever its last head.

entries.sf2e.npcability.sihedronguardthunderstri: If the next action the aeon guard uses is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet. In addition, if the spell requires an attack roll or a Reflex save, any targets of the spell that have lesser cover reduce the bonuses they gain from cover by 1 against the spell.

entries.sf2e.specificrule.dragonkin.dragonstenac: Dragon's Tenacity — Effect makes you Paralyzed
Dragon's Tenacity — Magic effect makes you Paralyzed
entries.sf2e.specificrule.dragonkin.moodscales.n: If you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.cutemdeep.note: When you successfully Demoralize the target of your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!}, the target doesn't become immune to your further attempts to Demoralize them.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.directive.leadby: When you use an act of leadership after issuing one or more envoy directives earlier that turn, you can choose one envoy directive you activated. You grant the lead by example benefits for that directive even if you didn't meet the usual requirements to lead by example. You can do this once per turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.effortlessinflue:
When you succeed at a check with Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation, allies within 60 feet who witnessed your success gain a +1 status bonus to the next check they attempt with that skill within 1 minute (or a +2 bonus if your check was a critical success).

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ZQM4vfHEKgxvNJik]{Effect: Effortless Influencer}
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.getem.leadbyexam: Get Em! — Initial Lead by Example Strike
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.hanginthere.crit: The target gains temporary Hit Points equal to double their level plus your Charisma modifier. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.B4JhFkbk5WHmWcOZ]{Effect: Hang In There!}
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.hanginthere.succ: The target gains temporary Hit Points their level plus your Charisma modifier. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.B4JhFkbk5WHmWcOZ]{Effect: Hang In There!}
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.pardonme.note: When you successfully Tumble Through using Deception, the foe whose space you passed through is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the end of its next turn.
The first time per day when you roll a natural 1 on a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check, you don't automatically reduce your degree of success (you get a critical failure only if your result is 10 lower than the DC).
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.smoothdiversions: Creatures only become aware you were trying to trick them if you critically fail to Create a Diversion. Otherwise the creature assumes that your diversion was part of your regular bravado.

When you succeed at an attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, you can immediately @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} or Step as a free action.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.envoy.takeemalive.togg: Take 'Em Alive — Add charisma to Strike damage
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.forcefield.a: Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:19] check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.forcefield.e: Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17] check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.forcefield.p: Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:15] check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.forcefield.s: Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:18] check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.forcefield.t: Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:20] check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.forcefield.u: Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:16] check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.solariancrys: On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until it recovers from the persistent bleed damage.

On a critical hit while you're graviton attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn.

On a critical hit while you're graviton attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:31] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 2 rounds.

When you hit an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} creature with your solar weapon while graviton attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:31] save or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.
On a critical hit while you're photon attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.
On a critical hit while you're photon attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:31] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 2 rounds.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.equipment.upgrades.wea: If the target has a shield raised, the shield takes the same amount of persistent damage (its wielder rolls the flat check to see if the persistent damage ends, or the GM rolls if the shield is no longer in someone's possession). Unlike normal void damage, the void damage from an entropic destabilizer damages objects, constructs, and the like by eroding them away.
When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.
When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.
On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save.
On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] save.

On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} if unholy) until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save.

On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} if unholy) until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:35] save.

On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute (or 1 hour on a critical failure).

On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute (or 1 hour on a critical failure).
On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target.

On a critically successful Strike, the target becomes unable to make sound. The target can't use sonic attacks, nor can it use actions with the auditory trait. This also prevents the target from casting spells due to the incantations or sounds involved in casting, with the exception of subtle spells. The target can resist the effects of the silencer with a successful @Check[will|dc:27] save.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.ikeshti.scrappersingen: Was the device higher level than you?
entries.sf2e.specificrule.kalo.arcticbite.note: Ignores an amount of the target's cold resistance equal to your level. A creature's immunities are unaffected.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.kalo.electrickalo.alte: If you cast this spell with only 1 target, you gain electricity resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) until the end of your next turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.kalo.gelidbite.note: On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the end of your next turn, unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.kalo.silenttide.improv: Silent Tide — Improved Sneak While Swimming
entries.sf2e.specificrule.mystic.connection.akas: You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.z0Spgrf92nmaqjCW]{Akashic Assistant} focus spell.
You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CjVOXjuvvTJqC7AD]{Data Drain} focus spell.

When you Transfer Vitality, the target receives a psychic download from the Akashic Record and can immediately attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} as a reaction. This doesn't trigger any special abilities, reactions, or free actions that trigger when a creature uses Recall Knowledge.
You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mAu69GVbFKYzQM5a]{Akashic Fount} focus spell.

You create an extradimensional memory palace that functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vPWMEyVTreMOoFnm]. Creating a door to the demiplane takes 1 minute. The memory palace keeps the same layout each time you access it, adjustable during daily preparations. Each phantasmal minion in your memory palace functions as an akashic assistant (like those created by the *akashic assistant* spell).
entries.sf2e.specificrule.mystic.connection.elem: You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5apI8Yamauo02VYR]{Elemental Barrier} epiphany spell.
Defending against electricity or sonic damage
Defending against bludgeoning or piercing damage
Defending against acid or slashing damage
You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.DZOjyZBZUrzkw5q2]{Elemental Nova} epiphany spell.

When you Transfer Vitality, choose an elemental trait: air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood. If one or more of your elemental epiphanies are active, you must select the elemental trait you chose as part of casting those spells. Until the end of their next turn, the target's next Strike deals damage based on the chosen trait (your choice), rather than its typical damage type: electricity or sonic for air, bludgeoning or piercing for earth, acid or slashing for metal, fire for fire, bludgeoning or cold for water, or piercing or poison for wood.
You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d5dmu4HZ3YyrwcaF]{Elemental Weapon} epiphany spell.

When you heal a bonded ally with Transfer Vitality, your ally gains resistance equal to half your mystic level to the two damage types chosen during your daily preparations until the beginning of your next turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.mystic.connection.heal: You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zzi7LUKxKNWr5GsG]{Vitality Nova} focus spell.
You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MTulATAiOZfZNQ9d]{Vital Rebirth} focus spell.

When you Transfer Vitality, attempt to counteract one affliction affecting the target, or attempt to counteract one effect of your choice imposing one of the following conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}.

In addition, if you didn't counteract the effect, but you would've if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

When you Transfer Vitality, attempt to counteract one affliction affecting the target, or attempt to counteract one effect of your choice imposing one of the following conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned}.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.mystic.connection.rhyt: You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.AlYzxLKWZujnzsjJ]{Shuffle Repeat} focus spell.
When you Transfer Vitality, you can extend the duration of any active epiphany from the rhythm connection by 1 round.
The first time each round you Transfer Vitality, the target who regained Hit Points can Stride as a free action. This has the traversal trait.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.mystic.connection.shad: You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows} focus spell.
You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison} focus spell.

When you Transfer Vitality, the target's shadow darkens and swells, reducing bright light within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the target to dim light. This is a form of magical darkness and can overcome non-magical light sources or attempt to counteract magical light. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while in this dim light and can use the concealed condition to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}. This lasts until the end of your next turn.
You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap} focus spell.
When you Transfer Vitality, the target can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} once before the end of their next turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.mystic.harmony.label: Harmony
entries.sf2e.specificrule.mystic.wastenot.addend: Your vitality network gains @Damage[(2*@item.rank)[healing]] Hit Points.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.operative.defensivegun: Defensive Gunner — Gun already has the parry trait.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.operative.specializati: You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qbyer2woEdGXZzoR]{Sabotage} as a free action whenever you critically hit a tech creature with a melee or ranged attack, targeting the triggering creature.

You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qbyer2woEdGXZzoR]{Sabotage} as a reaction whenever a tech creature or a creature using a tech weapon critically fails a melee attack roll against you, targeting the triggering creature or weapon.

If you fail your first ranged Strike against your mark using a weapon in the sniper weapon group, you Reload your sniper weapon as a free action. The Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty.
Enhanced Exploit — First ranged Strike against mark
entries.sf2e.specificrule.promession.note: The target gets a result one degree of success worse than it rolled on its Fortitude save. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Mjzoqg7MpTst3koD]{Spell Effect: Promession}
entries.sf2e.specificrule.sarcesian.undeadslayer: When you succeed or critically succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge against an undead creature that you can see, you identify a weak spot in their defenses—for 1 minute, you gain access to the critical specialization effects of all weapons and unarmed attacks for attacks you make against that specific creature.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.sharedancestryfeats.do: Routine use of your arms allows you to quickly move held equipment around. You Interact twice to draw, stow, or swap items you have up to twice.
You can efficiently move held equipment between your four arms. You Interact twice, using each to draw, stow, or swap items you have.
Routine use of your arms allows you to quickly move held equipment around. You Interact twice to draw, stow, or swap items you have up to twice.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.skittermander.clinging: You can only use Grab following a successful critical hit with your jaws (rather than on a hit) or when you have a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}.
The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. This increases to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} if this is the second time it hit you this turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.harmonicconve: When you use an action with the disharmony trait, you gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half your level.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.nimbussurge.g: If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.nimbussurge.p: If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.shatteringimp: On a hit, the target takes a –10-foot status penalty to Speed until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ll3uZdiSqaszP3fn]{Effect: Shattering Impact}
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.solarflare.gr: On a critical success, you can attempt a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} using your Athletics even if you don't have a free hand or are not adjacent to the target.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.solarweapon.g: When you successfully Strike a creature using your solar weapon, that creature's space and all squares adjacent to it are difficult terrain for that creature until the end of its next turn.

When you successfully Strike a creature using your solar weapon, that creature treats all squares adjacent to the square where they were struck as being difficult terrain until the end of its next turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.solarweapon.t: Twin Solar Weapon — Use two hands
entries.sf2e.specificrule.solarian.stellarresili: When you roll a success on a Fortitude or Will save against a mental or incapacitation effect, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} as a free action.
When you Auto-Fire, the size of the cone is equal to the weapon's full range increment, rather than half.
When using the Auto-Fire action, you can designate a target anywhere in the cone to be your primary target, rather than the creature closest to you.
When you successfully make a ranged Strike with an automatic weapon, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} the target until the start of your next turn.
When you successfully Disarm, Grapple, Reposition, Shove, or Trip a creature, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

When you attack with an area weapon, you can select a number of allies within the area equal to half your Constitution modifier. The selected allies are unaffected by the attack. In addition, enemies who succeed (but not critically succeed) on their save against an area attack you make are still @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.soldier.intimidatingta: Only the first hostile action that the creature takes is affected.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.soldier.suppressingfir: If you make an attack with a weapon that has the area trait, enemies in the affected area who fail their save against your attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.boomingboot: All creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around the creature you summoned take 1d4 sonic damage per spell rank (@Damage[((@item.level)d4)[sonic]]).
Any die you roll for damage that has a result lower than 2 becomes a result of 2 instead.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.deleteroota: Replace *delete's* target with "one construct or tech creature." Instead of delete's normal effects, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr] by you if its level is equal to or lower than your level – 3. It can attempt a Will saving throw to resist being controlled by you. If the target is already under someone else's command, the controlling creature also rolls a saving throw, and the construct uses the better result.
**Critical Failure** As failure, but the duration is 1 hour.
**Critical Success** The target is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 24 hours.
**Failure** The construct or tech creature becomes a minion under your control. The spell gains a duration of 1 minute, but it is dismissed if you or an ally attacks the construct or tech minion.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.grenadespel: If your next action is to Cast a Spell with a burst effect that requires a Reflex save, the spell does not immediately take effect, but it instead is installed into the held grenade. Until the end of your next turn, any creatures caught in the Area Fire of the grenade are also affected by the installed spell; creatures do not make a separate Reflex save against the spell and instead use the same result they rolled against the grenade.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.hardlightil: Creatures cannot attempt to disbelieve your illusion by merely touching or attempting to damage it, but they can still use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to examine it and attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature succeeds (but not critically succeeds) at a Perception check or Will save to disbelieve the illusion, you can reprogram it as a reaction by attempting a Computers check against the target's Perception DC. If you succeed, the target fails to disbelieve the illusion.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.overvoltres: The spell ignores an amount of the target's resistance to acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage equal to your level. This applies to all damage the spell deals, including persistent damage and damage caused by an ongoing effect of the spell, such as the wall created by wall of fire. A creature's immunities are unaffected.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.shatterspel: You successfully counteract the target, one creature of your choice occupying the same space as the spell effect or magic item takes force damage equal to 1d4 × the target's counteract rank with a basic Reflex save against your spell DC; if the target has a trait corresponding to a type of damage, such as fire, this effect deals that damage instead of force.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.signalboost: Increase the spell's range by 30 feet. As is standard for increasing spell ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, you extend its range to 30 feet.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.splittunnel: You can choose a second target within range. You roll a single attack roll and compare the result to the AC of both targets. This counts as one attack for your multiple attack penalty. To the second target, the spell deals only half the amount of damage it would normally deal for its degree of success, and it has no effects beyond the spell's initial damage (such as imposing conditions or penalties).
entries.sf2e.specificrule.spellshape.sudospell.a: The spell's energy reverberates and echoes. You can Cast the Spell a second time before the end of your next turn without expending a spell slot.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.witchwarper.anchorings: The Strike gains the anchoring trait. You can reroll the damage dice rolled for this strike, but you must use the second result, even if it's worse.
The Strike gains the anchoring trait.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.witchwarper.paradox.an: You see and understand infinite possibilities and complex theoretical equations as clearly as though they were etched into your surroundings. When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, you can apply the result against two related creatures, hazards, unattended objects, and effects in your quantum field. Whenever you sustain your quantum field, you can Seek or Recall Knowledge against an appropriate target in your quantum field as a free action.

Your movements blur as images of alternate iterations of you flicker around your current form, and your speech echoes with a chorus of otherworldly sounds. Any time an enemy within the quantum field attempts an action with the concentrate trait, the action is disrupted unless they succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5].
entries.sf2e.specificrule.witchwarper.paradox.ga: Supernatural static swirls around you, making thoughts slippery for those unaccustomed to your presence. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures within your quantum field. When a creature within your quantum field hits you with an attack, you lose this benefit against that creature until the start of your next turn.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.witchwarper.paradox.pr: You have a modicum of control of the flow of time that surrounds you, allowing you to speed yourself and others up, or decrease the flow of time for others. An enemy creature that uses a move action inside your quantum field takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speed during that action. You and your allies gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed when you use a move action inside your quantum field during that action.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.witchwarper.quantumana: Quantum Analysis — Attacking enemy within Quantum Field

You ignore any flat check required due to the creature being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or behind cover.
entries.sf2e.specificrule.witchwarper.quantumfie: Inside or Adjacent to Your Quantum Field
entries.sf2e.specificrule.witchwarper.zoneoverla: Debris Zone becomes greater difficult terrain.
The zone overlap forces creatures to attempt another saving throw.
Twisted Dark Zone ignores the temporary immunity of creatures that previously critically succeeded at the save for 1 round.
